scripts.release:ci: npm run release:publish && npm run release:tag-alpha
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @webmaster-droid/contracts && npm run build --workspace @webmaster-droid/web && npm run build --workspace @webmaster-droid/server && npm run build --workspace @webmaster-droid/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @webmaster-droid/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @webmaster-droid/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @webmaster-droid/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @webmaster-droid/cli
